events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`. The core issue: sight-glass bubbles alone aren't a valid charge-verification method against the mfr charging chart — bubbles can appear with correct charge (flash gas/moisture) or be absent on undercharged TXV systems — so relying on a misread sight glass instead of the chart's subcooling/superheat method is non-compliant, hence a **fail** with **medium** risk (installed-defective).
